passive.comment: This type is for features that don't require any addition to any character traits and just adds an ability that is always active

modifier.comment: This type is for features modify an aspect of the character

upgrade.comment: This type is for features that get better over time so they don't overlap (can be used on resource or modification feature types

asi.comment: This type is for asi levels

subclass.comment: This type checks if you would get a feature from a subclass at this level, then calls the subclass you chose to grab the feature

resource.comment: This subtype is for features that have an amount of times you can use it per period of time

choice.comment: This subtype is for features that require you to choose between an amount of options from one of the external lists

external_choice.comment: This subtype is for features that require you to choose between an amount of options from one of the external lists

save_dc.comment: This subtype os for features that make a save dc

spell_list_addition.comment: This subtype is for features that add a spell to your spell_list. Cannot be used with classes/subclasses that don't have a spell_list.
